intro: Pterotheca dioscoridis, commonly known as Dioscorea villosa, is a perennial vine plant belonging to the yam family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic properties. The bioactive constituents of Pterotheca dioscoridis include diosgenin, a steroidal saponin that has been shown to have estrogenic activity, as well as other saponins, alkaloids, and flavonoids. In herbal medicine, Pterotheca dioscoridis is often used to prepare tinctures, capsules, and teas, which are used to support hormone balance, alleviate menopausal symptoms, and enhance fertility.
